page.title: Invoice instantly, comply with the DIAN
page.subtitle: Issue electronic invoices, credit and debit notes validated by the DIAN directly from PayNetLink. No complications, 100% integrated with your ISP operation.

automaticIssuance.title: Automatic issuance
automaticIssuance.description: Automatically generate electronic invoices at the end of each billing period for your clients.

dianValidation.title: DIAN validation
dianValidation.description: All invoices are validated in real time with the DIAN. Comply with Colombian regulations effortlessly.

creditDebitNotes.title: Credit and debit notes
creditDebitNotes.description: Issue credit and debit notes associated with existing invoices. Adjustments and corrections in seconds.

downloadAndEmail.title: Download and email delivery
downloadAndEmail.description: Download invoices in PDF and XML, or send them automatically by email to your clients when issued.

ctaSection.title: Start invoicing electronically today
ctaSection.subtitle: Comply with the DIAN and automate your invoicing from PayNetLink.
